title: Delete
drDigitalIntro: The Delete key erases the letter or space directly to the left of your blinking cursor. It's your go-to for fixing typing mistakes.

playgroundTask.instructions: This sentence has extra letters sprinkled in — use the Delete key to erase each one. Click into the text, use the arrow keys to find the extras, and press Delete to remove them.
playgroundTask.startingText: Helllo, my namme is Dr. Diggital and I lovve computers!
playgroundTask.correctText: Hello, my name is Dr. Digital and I love computers!
mustInclude: Hello, my name is Dr. Digital and I love computers!

drDigitalSuccess: That's Delete — mistakes, begone! You cleaned up every extra letter.
drDigitalHint: Look for letters that appear twice where they should appear once: the extra l in 'Helllo', the extra m in 'namme', the extra g in 'Diggital', and the extra v in 'lovve'. Click next to each one and press Delete.
